name: Spawn Position
desc: Sets the player's spawn position (where compass points and respawn occurs).

implementation.overview: Sets the world spawn point and updates the compass direction. Sent on world join and whenever the server changes spawn (/setworldspawn). No known module directly targets this packet in the examined client sources (500+ folders).

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S05PacketSpawnPosition)
modules.purpose: Server sends S05PacketSpawnPosition to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.

implementation.general_hooks: Client: NetHandlerPlayClient.handleSpawnPosition(S05) — updates WorldClient spawn point.\n\nServer: Sent on join game and when spawn is changed.
